tasks.title: B-0: Preflight Verification
tasks.description: Verify the worktree at FRAME_DEPLOYED-brp is correctly set up on branch feature/brp with a clean baseline before any code changes.
tasks.details:
## Implementation Steps

1. Confirm worktree exists at `/Users/arpit/Documents/FRAME_DEPLOYED-brp` via `ls -la`
2. Verify branch is `feature/brp` via `git branch --show-current`
3. Run `npm install` and confirm exit 0
4. Run `npx tsc -b --noEmit` and confirm exit 0
5. Run `npm run test:run` and capture output (note any pre-existing failures)
6. Document baseline in journal entry

## Pseudo-code
```bash
cd /Users/arpit/Documents/FRAME_DEPLOYED-brp
git branch --show-current  # expect: feature/brp
npm install
npx tsc -b --noEmit
npm run test:run
```

## Key Files
- Worktree root: `/Users/arpit/Documents/FRAME_DEPLOYED-brp/`
- package.json (verify deps)
- tsconfig.json (verify config)
tasks.testStrategy:
1. `git worktree list` shows FRAME_DEPLOYED-brp on feature/brp
2. `npm install` exits 0 with no errors
3. `npx tsc -b --noEmit` exits 0
4. `npm run test:run` exits 0 (or known failures documented)
5. No uncommitted changes to existing files

tasks.title: B-1: P1 Types and Constants Module
tasks.description: Create the BRP type model and constants files with all core types per F1.1 and F1.2 - the foundation that all subsequent phases build upon.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. `npx tsc -b --noEmit` exits 0 - both files compile in isolation
2. Import test in brp.test.ts: `import { FibonacciPoint, Epic, ... } from './brp'` compiles
3. Grep confirms no imports from React, Zustand, or any FRAME service
4. Visual review confirms all types match PRD F1.1 specification

tasks.title: B-2: computeCapacity Function with Tests
tasks.description: Implement the computeCapacity pure function in brp.ts with comprehensive unit tests per F1.3 specification.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. `npm run test:run -- src/domain/brp.test.ts` exits 0
2. Test verifies PRD example: 343 total for 6×10×6 - 12 - 5
3. Test verifies negative total clamps to 0
4. Test verifies zero resources yields zero capacity
5. Pure function: same inputs always produce same outputs (deterministic)

tasks.title: B-3: computeDelta and computeVariance Functions with Tests
tasks.description: Implement computeDelta and computeVariance pure functions per F1.4 and F1.5 with threshold boundary tests.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. `npm run test:run -- src/domain/brp.test.ts` exits 0
2. Tests cover: null delta (missing frameResult), null delta (missing humanEstimate)
3. Tests cover exact thresholds: ratio = 0.20 → 'agree', ratio = 0.201 → 'caution'
4. Tests cover exact thresholds: ratio = 0.50 → 'caution', ratio = 0.501 → 're-groom'
5. Tests cover confidence bump: 'agree' + confidence 0.39 → 'caution'
6. Tests cover 'flagged' for thin description (< 80 chars)

tasks.title: B-4: computePodMetrics Function with Tests
tasks.description: Implement computePodMetrics pure function per F1.6 with flagged-exclusion regression guard and edge case tests.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. `npm run test:run -- src/domain/brp.test.ts` exits 0
2. Coverage report shows ≥ 95% lines for brp.ts
3. Regression test: pod with flagged epic, verify that epic's estimate is NOT in humanLoad/frameLoad
4. Empty pod test: all metrics return 0 or safe defaults
5. All-flagged pod: loads are 0, flaggedCount equals epicCount

tasks.title: B-5: brpStore State Shape and Loading Actions
tasks.description: Create the brpStore Zustand store with state shape and Loading action group (loadCrew, loadPods, loadEpicsIntoPod, reset) per F2.1-F2.5.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. `npm run test:run -- src/stores/brpStore.test.ts` exits 0
2. Tests verify initial state shape matches F2.1
3. loadCrew test: crew added to crews array
4. loadPods test: pods correctly placed on specified crew
5. loadEpicsIntoPod test: epics correctly placed on specified pod
6. reset test: all state returns to initial
7. Grep confirms NO derived data (variance, delta, totalCapacity) in state

tasks.title: B-6: brpStore Capacity, Estimates, and Analysis Actions
tasks.description: Implement Capacity, Estimates, and Analysis action groups (updatePodCapacity, setHumanEstimate, runAnalysis, setEpicAnalysisStatus, setEpicFrameResult) per F2.2.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. `npm run test:run -- src/stores/brpStore.test.ts` exits 0
2. updatePodCapacity test: inputs stored, computeCapacity(inputs) = expected
3. setHumanEstimate test: value stored, computeVariance returns expected band
4. runAnalysis test: transitions 'idle' → 'running' → 'done'
5. Grep across brpStore.ts confirms NO variance/delta/totalCapacity stored
6. Reviewer confirms store imports only AIEstimator interface from domain/brp.ts

tasks.title: B-7: brpStore Navigation and UI Actions
tasks.description: Implement Navigation and UI action groups (setView, select*, togglePodCollapse, setReGroomOnlyFilter, modal actions) per F2.2.
tasks.details:
## Implementation Steps

1. Add Navigation actions:
   - setView(view: 'portfolio' | 'pod')
   - selectCrew(id: string | null)
   - selectPod(id: string | null)
   - selectEpic(id: string | null)

2. Add UI state actions:
   - togglePodCollapse(podId: string): toggles podId in collapsedPods Set
   - setReGroomOnlyFilter(enabled: boolean)
   - openModalFor(modal: string, context?: { podId?: string })
   - closeModal()

3. Add tests:
   - setView changes view state
   - select* actions update selection state
   - togglePodCollapse adds/removes from Set
   - modal actions open/close correctly with context

4. Final verification:
   - Grep confirms NO derived state anywhere in store
   - All state is inputs/raw data only

## Pseudo-code
```typescript
setView: (view) => set({ view }),
selectCrew: (id) => set({ selectedCrewId: id }),
selectPod: (id) => set({ selectedPodId: id }),
selectEpic: (id) => set({ selectedEpicId: id }),

togglePodCollapse: (podId) => set((s) => {
  const next = new Set(s.collapsedPods);
  if (next.has(podId)) next.delete(podId);
  else next.add(podId);
  return { collapsedPods: next };
}),

setReGroomOnlyFilter: (enabled) => set({ reGroomOnlyFilter: enabled }),

openModalFor: (modal, context) => set({ openModal: modal, modalContext: context ?? null }),
closeModal: () => set({ openModal: null, modalContext: null }),
```
tasks.testStrategy:
1. `npm run test:run -- src/stores/brpStore.test.ts` exits 0
2. All navigation actions update correct state
3. togglePodCollapse correctly adds/removes from Set
4. Modal actions set/clear openModal and modalContext
5. CRITICAL: `grep -n 'variance\|delta\|totalCapacity' src/stores/brpStore.ts` returns 0 matches
6. Action list is complete against PRD F2.2 five groups

tasks.title: B-8: AIEstimator Interface and Zod Schemas
tasks.description: Define the AIEstimator interface in domain/brp.ts (already declared) and add Zod schemas for FrameResult and AnalysisEvent validation per F3.1.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. `npm run test:run` on Zod parse tests exits 0
2. Valid FrameResult: schema.parse() succeeds
3. Invalid FrameResult (bad type): schema.parse() throws
4. All 4 AnalysisEvent kinds parse correctly
5. Event with unknown kind fails
6. Confidence out of range [0,1] fails

tasks.title: B-9: Simulated Estimator and Provider
tasks.description: Implement createSimulatedEstimator() and getEstimator() provider per F3.2-F3.5 with determinism and schema validation tests.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. `npm run test:run -- src/services/brp/ai/simulatedEstimator.test.ts` exits 0
2. Determinism: 10 runs with same epic.id produce identical frameEstimate
3. Breakdown sum: |sum(breakdown.points) - frameEstimate| ≤ 1
4. Confidence: inversely related to breakdown variance
5. All emitted events pass `AnalysisEventSchema.parse()`
6. Event sequence is started → progress → done (or error)
7. Grep confirms estimatorProvider imports only interface, never simulatedEstimator directly

tasks.title: B-10: brpGitlabService Skeleton with Mocked Tests
tasks.description: Create brpGitlabService.ts with 4 operations composing gitlabClient, with mocked unit tests per F4.1-F4.5.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. `npm run test:run -- src/services/brp/brpGitlabService.test.ts` exits 0
2. fetchPodEpics: returned Epic has analysisStatus 'raw', frameResult null, humanEstimate null
3. fetchPods: returned Pod has CapacityInputs with spPerResource = DEFAULT_SP_PER_RESOURCE
4. GitLab error response → service returns { success: false, error: '...' }, no throw
5. Grep confirms ZERO direct fetch() calls - only gitlabClient composition
6. Grep confirms ZERO pre-filled frameResult or analysisStatus other than 'raw'

tasks.title: B-11: brpGitlabService Live Smoke Test
tasks.description: Add optional live smoke test for brpGitlabService against real GitLab, gated by VITE_BRP_LIVE_SMOKE=1 per F4.1.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Default run: `npm run test:run -- src/services/brp/brpGitlabService.test.ts` skips live tests, exits 0
2. Live run (manual): VITE_BRP_LIVE_SMOKE=1 runs live tests against real GitLab
3. Live test verifies: Crew[] returned, Pod[] returned, Epic[] has correct shape
4. Journal documents manual run output as evidence
5. Skip-by-default verified: no env var → test suite passes without network

tasks.title: B-12: Knowledge Base Documentation
tasks.description: Create knowledge base markdown docs for all new BRP modules under docs/knowledge/ per existing patterns.
tasks.details:
## Implementation Steps

1. Create `docs/knowledge/domain/brp.md`:
   - Document type model (Crew → Pod → Epic hierarchy)
   - Document pure functions (computeCapacity, computeDelta, computeVariance, computePodMetrics)
   - Document architectural invariants (no derived state stored)
   - Link to source file locations

2. Create `docs/knowledge/stores/brpStore.md`:
   - Document state shape
   - Document action groups (Loading, Capacity, Estimates, Analysis, Navigation/UI)
   - Document the contract: store holds inputs, never derived data

3. Create `docs/knowledge/services/brp/simulatedEstimator.md`:
   - Document AIEstimator interface
   - Document determinism guarantee (same epic → same result)
   - Document event stream shape (started → progress → done)
   - Document swap path for P7

4. Create `docs/knowledge/services/brp/brpGitlabService.md`:
   - Document 4 operations
   - Document composition pattern (composes gitlabClient)
   - Document boundary: GitLab shapes → BRP types
   - Document: epics arrive 'raw', never pre-filled

5. Update `docs/knowledge/README.md` with links to new docs

## Key Patterns to Follow
- Match existing docs/knowledge/components/issueRefinery/ style
- Include source file paths with line numbers
- Document public API and key invariants
tasks.testStrategy:
1. All 4 new markdown files exist in correct locations
2. docs/knowledge/README.md updated with links
3. Manual rendering check: markdown renders correctly in GitHub/VS Code
4. Each doc links to source file with line numbers
5. Cross-references between docs are valid

tasks.title: B-13: Devlog Entry, ADR-0003, and Final Commit
tasks.description: Complete the headless layer with devlog entry, ADR documenting the pure-model decision, and final commit marking branch ready for PR.
tasks.details:
## Implementation Steps

1. Create `docs/adr/0003-brp-pure-model-no-derived-state.md`:
   - Title: BRP Pure Model: No Derived State Storage
   - Status: Accepted
   - Context: Why stored variance/delta caused bugs in sample code
   - Decision: Derived data computed by pure functions, never stored
   - Consequences: UI must call functions at render time; simpler mental model
   - Follow ADR template from existing ADRs

2. Create `docs/devlog/<date>-brp-headless.md`:
   - Date: actual session date
   - Summary: what shipped in this headless layer
   - File counts: X types, Y pure functions, Z tests, etc.
   - Key decisions made during implementation
   - Link to ADR-0003

3. Update `docs/devlog/README.md` with link to new entry

4. Final verification:
   - `git diff --name-only main...HEAD` shows only NEW files
   - `npm run build` exits 0
   - All acceptance criteria AC1-AC12 verified

5. Final commit:
   - Conventional commit: `feat(brp): headless layer complete (P1-P4)`
   - Co-authored-by Claude
   - Do NOT push or create PR (user decides)

## Acceptance Criteria Checklist (verify all before commit)
- AC1: `npx tsc -b --noEmit` exits 0
- AC2: `npm run test:run -- src/domain/brp.test.ts` exits 0
- AC3: `npm run test:run -- src/stores/brpStore.test.ts` exits 0
- AC4: `npm run test:run -- src/services/brp/` exits 0
- AC5: grep 'variance:' on Epic/Pod/Crew returns 0
- AC6: grep imports in brp.ts shows no React/Zustand/services
- AC7: grep in brpStore.ts shows no simulatedEstimator import
- AC8: grep in brpGitlabService.ts shows no direct fetch()
- AC9: git diff shows only NEW files
- AC10: no --no-verify in commit history
- AC11: deep-review checkpoint passed (prior task)
- AC12: `npm run build` exits 0
tasks.testStrategy:
1. ADR-0003 follows existing ADR template format
2. Devlog entry has correct date and summary
3. All 12 acceptance criteria pass (documented in commit message)
4. Final commit uses Conventional Commits format
5. `git diff --name-only main...HEAD` shows ONLY new BRP files
6. `npm run build` exits 0
7. Branch is clean, ready for PR (user decides when to open)
